## Summary
Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor

## How to test
List the exact commands and steps used to verify this change.

## Checklist
- [ ] Code compiles or runs locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data included
